item.title: Mercedes completes one-two as George Russell wins Australian Grand Prix ahead of Kimi Antonelli
item.description: The teammates finished well clear of the field after Ferrari’s pit strategy failed miserably.

item.description: The Aussie cut a dejected figure as he apologised to fans for the devastating situation.

item.description: The much-loved champion was chaired off the field as she bid farewell to cricket.

item.description: ‘I did everything in my power to stop it from happening.’

item.description: ‘We’re the ones driving and just waiting for something to go horribly wrong.’

item.title: Why AI's beginning doesn't mean the end of your career
item.description: Thousands of Australian jobs are on the chopping block as companies lean into artificial intelligence.

item.description: The 26-year-old has defected to Super Rugby, effective immediately.

item.description: Samsung just dropped the Galaxy S26 and we’ve found the hack that can slice up to $700 off your upgrade.

item.description: The Duchess of Sussex launched her lifestyle brand with the streaming site in 2025.

item.description: She said she still talks to him every day.

item.description: ‘We’re not just going to lie down and take it.’

item.description: The US bombing campaign has triggered a potentially deadly ‘acid rain’ phenomenon.

item.description: The announcement has been welcomed by sporting stars from around the globe.

item.description: The leader of the Nationals party is stepping down suddenly admitting it’s ‘time for me to feel normal again’.

item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Police respond to active shooting at synagogue in Michigan, US
item.description: A truck has crashed into a synagogue in Michigan and smoke is visible from the roof, local media reports say.

item.title: Queensland e-bike and motorcycle crash kills two teenagers in Greenbank
item.description: A motorcycle collided with the e-bike, which is believed to have not had headlights on.

item.title: Iran, Israel and US war live updates: US President Donald Trump says five Iranian National Women’s Soccer Team players reportedly granted asylum in Australia
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news as the conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel escalates.

item.title: Carlton coach Michael Voss ‘pleased’ for fans after narrow win against Richmond
item.description: Michael Voss says he and his club has been ‘targeted’ and only a ‘madman’ would do his job.

item.title: NRL superstar Reece Walsh again in the spotlight after Broncos shock loss to Parramatta
item.description: The Broncos superstar has been accused of ‘clocking off’ and finishing the night early.

item.title: Teenage boy killed in a suspected stolen car in Hoppers Crossing
item.description: Police believe the car was involved in an attempted carjacking just moments prior.

item.title: Aussie internationals overlooked in Hundred auction but Matt Short gets snapped up late
item.description: Unlike their female counterparts, Australia’s cricket men weren’t in demand.

item.title: Two brothers shot multiple times during massive brawl in Western Sydney
item.description: The fight involved about 15 people.
